text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Takoyaki Classics, here I come! ♪ Fast food, cheap 'n good! Takoyaki Big Leagues, I'm comin' for youuu! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Oh, g'mornin' Trainer! Guess what? I had the most
awesome dream!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I won a big race, and thanks to the prime
minister, I got 90 percent off takoyaki for life!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Just imagine—a 300-yen serving of takoyaki
would only cost 30 yen! Talk about life-changing!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Wooo! I'm all fired up now! I'm gonna win me a
whole bunch of races 'n make that dream come
true!
